text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun and I have been invited to a
special event.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The sun is so bright and twinkly today! It's the
perfect weather for a wedding-themed event. ☆
The photos are gonna turn out great!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's because I never would've thought I'd be a
model! I'll have to change super quickly, and
everyone will be looking at me...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second. Who's that looking around so
restlessly?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Rice! Heyyy! Did you come to watch the
event?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Eep! A-actually, yes... Weddings are very happy
events, so I've been looking forward to it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I finished training early so—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Aaah! W-was that roar just now... from the rain?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sky suddenly opens up, and down pours
torrential rain. I'm sure it'll just pass by, but...

text_block_list.name: Photo Shoot Staff
text_block_list.text:
Darn it. Looks like it's not clearing up. We could
keep going, but with so few guests... Should we
cancel?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry... I'm so sorry! This is definitely my fault.
Please forgive me.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: If I hadn't shown up, then—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Exactly! Anyway, we're not gonna cancel the
shoot. A little bit of rain won't wash away my
shine!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You see, it'll only make me twinkle brighter! You
two should just enjoy the show! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ding-dong! ♪ Thanks for waiting, everyone! ☆
Let's get this party started—with a parade!

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
You're so cute, Maya! Ugh... I wish the weather
were nicer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This rain is just one of my accessories! ♪ Here,
take a look! See how it twinkles? ☆

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
She's right! The rain is catching the light of the
camera like sequins!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Right?! ♪ But we're just getting started! Three...
two... one...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sunshiiine! ☆

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Woooow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Mayano! Everyone was
smiling... It's like you cast a magic spell!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks! ☆ My dad actually taught me how
to read the clouds and tell when they'll clear.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
He's a pilot who soars through the skies, after all!
Ehehe!
choice_data_list:
So you can make the rain a part of your
performance too, huh?

So you can make the rain a part of your
performance too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That's right! But what's important isn't the
weather. Or even the event itself! What's
important is...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I am everyone's sun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
When I wore these clothes for the first time, I
swore that I'd twinkle so that everyone around me
could twinkle too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's what I've always dreamed of! It's what
grown-up women do!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um... You're all shining so brightly...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I guess that means I should do my best too.
There's a twinkle in my heart now... thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That event was so much fun! But my absolute
favorite thing is coming up later—the fireworks
show!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I really wanted to watch them with
you in my most twinkly outfit, but it got all wet...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I'll just have to knock you out with my outfit
next time, Trainer. ☆
choice_data_list:
You shine brighter than anyone else, no matter
what you wear.

Let's work hard so you get invited next time
too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm... I'm in a tailspin! Did you just propose?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Aw, don't be embarrassed! You want us to run
into the future together, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So that means I'll be your sun forever and ever! ☆
I won't lose a race ever again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun says this with a huge smile on
her face.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll get invited next time and the time after
that. I'll become someone that these clothes suit
even more, and then—

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Th-then... that m-means... th-that... you'll...
always stay with... me...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! Wh-whoa! The fireworks! Look, Trainer,
look!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Um... W-well! We've seen the fireworks, so let's
go home! I'm hungry, and... and...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Listen, um... What I was saying earlier... I'll
definitely finish telling you someday when I'm a
bit braver.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So just wait until then!
